description_long: This is a medium-sized, ancient-style ceramic vase with a single rounded handle and a wide, slightly flared rim. The exterior is adorned with intricate, hand-painted motifs featuring stylized birds and swirling patterns, rendered in dark brown against a tan background. The rim is decorated with a repeating triangular border, adding a touch of geometric detail. The handle is robust and seamlessly integrated into the body, providing both functionality and aesthetic balance. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, indicative of traditional pottery techniques. The vase shows some minor surface imperfections, suggesting age or handcrafted origin.
description: A tan ceramic vase with a wide rim, single handle, and dark brown painted bird and swirl motifs. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with a decorative rim and minor imperfections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main bird motif and the handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the handle's attachment and the geometric border on the rim.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and a partial view of the bird motif.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the plainest section with vertical lines and minor surface wear.
